rows.label: qev065405_MSG0001
rows.name:
Your methods are far too soft! They
will tarnish the trust we have
built up over such a long time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065405_MSG0002
rows.name:
The trust of us Definians, built
up as spies for the Growth![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065405_MSG0003
rows.name: Shallow...! I have my own methods![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065405_MSG0004
rows.name:
Blending into Earthling customs, gaining their
trust, understanding them... There is information
that can only be obtained exactly because of that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065405_MSG0005
rows.name:
Is that not the best possible
way to be as a spy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065405_MSG0006
rows.name:
I have simply been putting
that into practice![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065405_MSG0007
rows.name:
Oh... But in the process of continuing
those methods, have you not developed
a special attachment to Earthlings?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065405_MSG0008
rows.name: Wh... What are you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065405_MSG0009
rows.name:
You have! Become far too accustomed
to the lives of Earthlings![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065405_MSG0010
rows.name:
Despite being given the crucial
mission of annihilating the Earthlings'
stronghold from the inside...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065405_MSG0011
rows.name:
Despite earning such immense
trust among the Definians...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065405_MSG0012
rows.name: You have betrayed us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065405_MSG0013
rows.name: Th-That is............[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065405_MSG0014
rows.name:
What is the matter? Why are you at a loss for words?
If you have no attachment to Earthlings and are
working for the Growth, then deny it immediately![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065405_MSG0016
rows.name: ............Hmph. So you cannot deny it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065405_MSG0017
rows.name:
By that attitude, I officially
determine you to be a traitor![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065405_MSG0018
rows.name:
The mission to annihilate the
Earthlings............ I shall
take over it myself...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065405_MSG0019
rows.name: Dieara...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065405_MSG0020
rows.name:
Hehehehe............ Erio! At the
very least, when you die, I shall
let you die in your Definian form.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065405_MSG0021
rows.name: This is the absolute least of my mercy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065405_MSG0023
rows.name: ............However.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065405_MSG0024
rows.name:
It seems there has been a
slight interruption... before
we can settle our problems.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065405_MSG0026
rows.name:
It appears the Earthling you deepened
your friendship with has finally
realized everything and rushed here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065405_MSG0027
rows.name:
Let us save our conclusion............
for after I bury that foolish one![ST:wait ]
